ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-10-2008 IN 206. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE WITHDRAWS ITS OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIFICALLY SET A TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/9/08 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET IN DEPT. 220 WITH NOTICE SENT BY PLAINTIFF. THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS WERE STIPULATED AMONG PARTIES: DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL TRIAL ASSIGNMENT; MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO BE HEARD UP UNTIL TRIAL WITH 15 DAYS NOTICE; PATHOLOGY PROVIDED BY 4/15/08; FIRST LOOK IS REDUCED TO 48 HOURS; PLAINTIFF TO DISCLOSE PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES WITHIN 2 WEEKS FROM HEARING DATE. AT THE REQEUST OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, THE COURT DISMISSED THE FOLLOWING DEFENDANTS: HERCULES, GENERAL ELECTRICS, PARK-HANNIFIN, AND VIACOM. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
